summary: Iteration 6 testing complete. All backend APIs (13/13) and frontend features (16/16) for marketplace listings and ISO Discogs search verified successfully.

seed_data_creation: Test listings created/deleted during pytest (TEST_ prefixed items cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 (Marketplace) features fully tested. Demo user has: 4 ISOs (including Reputation with cover art), 2 listings in Market (Reputation $100 BUY_NOW, Pink Floyd $45 BUY_NOW). ISO page has working DiscogsPicker component used in both New ISO and List for Sale modals. Discogs search API (GET /api/discogs/search) returns results with album art. All 3 listing types (BUY_NOW, MAKE_OFFER, TRADE) supported. My Listings tab has delete buttons. Market tab shows listing cards with type badges, prices, conditions, and seller usernames.

features: Discogs search input with results dropdown
Album art thumbnails in search results
Click to select shows preview with 'Change' button
'Or enter manually' link for manual entry
Form fields appear after selection (tags, budget, pressing, condition)
Create listings with 3 types (BUY_NOW, MAKE_OFFER, TRADE)
Condition dropdown with standard grades (Mint to Fair)
GET /api/listings returns active listings with seller data
Same card format as Market tab
Tagline: 'Buy, offer, or trade with collectors like you'
Two action buttons: 'New ISO' and 'List for Sale'
Three tabs: ISO, Market, My Listings
